name: German Oven Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Gradually add flour to egg substitute, beating with a rotary beater or in a blender.
3. Stir in milk and melted margarine.
4. Lightly oil or spray a 9-inch or 10-inch ovenproof skillet (a round cake pan works well).
5. Pour the batter into the prepared skillet.
6. Bake for 20 minutes. The pancake will form a well in the center and the sides will puff up.
7. Spoon fruit into the center of the pancake.
8. Loosen the pancake from the skillet with a wide spatula and cut into wedges with a sharp knife.
9. Serve immediately with powdered sugar and lemon wedges. Makes 2 servings.
